{{Quote|We are forever grateful to the Jedi Knights for the salvation of our people from the horrible drug that's tearing apart our nests.|Kimar Walc publicly thanking the [[Jedi]]|<ref name="HNN55">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|55|regional/1359_2.html|Arconan Smuggling Cartel Dismantled}}</ref>}}
'''Kimar Walc''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] from [[Cona/Legends|Cona]]. He was [[Nest Leader]] of the [[Grand Nest]] and had a son named [[Denn Walc|Denn]].

When [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Tassida Judrelle]], [[Quarmall]] and [[Stass Allie/Legends|Stass Allie]] discovered and penetrated the inner circle of [[Lojrak Shrag]]'s illegal [[Salt/Legends|salt]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] cartel on the Cona, Kimar Walc publicly expressed his gratitude to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on the [[HoloNet/Legends|Holonet]].
